channel.title: Computer Vision on Test
channel.description: Recent content in Computer Vision on Test

item.title: 2D Projective Transformations
item.description: What is 2D Projective Transformations? 2D Projective Transformations is a group of linear transformations in projective space $P^2$. Each transformation is invariant on geometric properties. Prerequisites concepts projective space homogeneous coordinates matrix multiplication degree of freedom Hierarchy of transformations Note that transformations except projective can also be described via $2 \times 3$ matrix, instead of $3 \times 3$. It is because they are 2D planar transformation in Euclidean space which doesn’t require homogeneous coordinates.
